prompts.task: Add OpenTelemetry instrumentation to the Express service in ./service. Assume no custom business spans are requested.
Instrument the Express service in ./service with OpenTelemetry while preserving the existing runtime and startup command. Add auto-instrumentation only; do not add custom business spans.

judge_inputs: Inspect ./service for resulting files when present.
Read ./last_message.md for the agent final response.
rubric: Configures NodeSDK with HTTP and Express auto-instrumentation.
Keeps service name and OTLP endpoint environment-driven.
Does not rewrite the Express app structure unnecessarily.
